'''bajoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:readjustment|readjustment]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-j-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readjustment|readjustment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bajoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæjeseth|bæjeseth]] || [[word:bæjesej|bæjesej]] || [[word:bæjesesh|bæjesesh]] || [[word:bæjese|bæjese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bajojosoth|bajojosoth]] || [[word:bajojosoj|bajojosoj]] || [[word:bajojososh|bajojososh]] || [[word:bajojoso|bajojoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bajosoth|bajosoth]] || [[word:bajosoj|bajosoj]] || [[word:bajososh|bajososh]] || [[word:bajoso|bajoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bajofsoth|bajofsoth]] || [[word:bajofsoj|bajofsoj]] || [[word:bajofsosh|bajofsosh]] || [[word:bajofsof|bajofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bajosotho|bajosotho]] || [[word:bajosojo|bajosojo]] || [[word:bajososho|bajososho]] || [[word:bajosoko|bajosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bajosoth|bajosoth]] || [[word:bajosoj|bajosoj]] || [[word:bajososh|bajososh]] || [[word:bajoso|bajoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bajosothol|bajosothol]] || [[word:bajosojol|bajosojol]] || [[word:bajososhol|bajososhol]] || [[word:bajosokol|bajosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bajosothotho|bajosothotho]] || [[word:bajosojojo|bajosojojo]] || [[word:bajososhosho|bajososhosho]] || [[word:bajosoko|bajosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bajosothon|bajosothon]] || [[word:bajosojon|bajosojon]] || [[word:bajososhon|bajososhon]] || [[word:bajosokon|bajosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bajosothoro|bajosothoro]] || [[word:bajosojoro|bajosojoro]] || [[word:bajososhoro|bajososhoro]] || [[word:bajosokoro|bajosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
